title: Shut Up Your Mouth Lyrics Yennamo Yedho Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Shut Up Your Mouth
Singer: Deepak, Shruti Haasan
Movie: Yennamo Yedho
Music: D Imman
Lyrics : Madhan Karky

Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana ..
Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth

yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, kobam yeno daa.
yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, pakkam nee vaadaa.
yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, seettram yenodaa.
hey haiyo haiyaiyoda, aada nee vaadaa.

Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana ..

..vizhigal seidha
coacoa vil idhazhai seidha
cocktailaai mannil vandha
penney naandhaan.
Nee parugathaaney unnai seidhaan.

Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
vaaya konjam moodu, un satti paana..

Azhagenra ondruthaan azhugaikkelaam moolam
azhaipaayum nenjamey alivukkellaam moolam
azhaipaaigiraai azhaipaaigiraai
ada azhagil nee saaigiraai.
kulir kaayavaa kulir kaayavaa
enadharugil nee maeigiraai.

Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
Shut Up Your Mouth ..

Adivaangi nenjiley meendum meendum kaayam
vilangaaga maarinen idhely enna maayam.
mirugangalin ranam pokkudhal
en thozhilai kondenada.
oru oosiyaai unnil yeriye
ranam aattra vandhenada.
valienbadhai valikonduthaan
eduppeney paaradaa.
Shut Up Your Mouth, ye let your body shout.

yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, bodhai yenoda..
yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, en kannaal thaanda.

yei yodaa yodaa yodaa, netre vendaanda..
yei yodaa yodaa yodaa
undhan moochil kattre naandhaanda.

Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth
Shut Up Your Mouth, un satti paana kouth

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Shut Up Your Mouth conveys playful teasing and flirtation between lovers, showcasing a light-hearted romantic vibe.

What is the plot context of the movie Ennamo Yedho?

The movie revolves around love and relationships, with this song highlighting the fun and quirky interactions between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Deepak and Shruti Haasan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Shut Up Your Mouth was composed by D Imman.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 19, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Shut Up Your Mouth, the playful dynamics between the lead characters in Ennamo Yedho are brought to life through catchy beats and lively lyrics. The song encapsulates the essence of youthful romance, filled with teasing and flirtation. With its upbeat tempo, it evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it perfect for celebrations. The collaboration between Deepak and Shruti Haasan adds a unique charm, making it a memorable track in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Shut Up Your Mouth from the movie Ennamo Yedho is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the playful banter between lovers. With the dynamic vocals of Deepak and Shruti Haasan, this song is sure to get you on your feet. D Imman's catchy composition combined with Karky's witty lyrics makes it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their mood!
stanzaMeanings: Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude?
Hey, what’s going on? Why are you angry? Hey, what’s going on? Come closer. Hey, what’s going on? Why are you rushing? Hey, don’t be like that, come here.
Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude?
...the girl who came to this world like a cocktail made from cocoa and eyes. You are the one who is running around.
Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Close your mouth a little, where is your attitude?

The beautiful one is the reason for all the beauty, my heart is calling out because of you. You are calling out, you are calling out, you are beautiful. Cool breeze, cool breeze, you are the one who is making me feel good.
Even if I embrace you, you still want to see without any hesitation.
Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude?

In my heart, I keep changing again and again, what magic is this? The sound of the drums is my profession. I have come to you with a wound that is like a thorn. I have taken the burden of the pain, look at it.
Shut up your mouth, let your body shout.
Hey, what’s going on? It’s my mind. Hey, what’s going on? It’s given by my eyes.
Hey, what’s going on? I don’t want it today. Hey, what’s going on? Your lips are the reason for my happiness.
Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude? Shut up your mouth, where is your attitude?
